name: P1: Spend Gate
description: Never change spend > ₹1L without Workbench approval.
natural_language: Never change spend > ₹1L without Workbench approval.
summary: Never change spend > ₹1L without Workbench approval.
ai_instruction: Never change spend > ₹1L without Workbench approval.

name: P2: Crisis Lock
description: Block all content if crisis probability > 70%.
natural_language: Block all content if crisis probability > 70%.
summary: Block all content if crisis probability > 70%.
ai_instruction: Block all content if crisis probability > 70%.

name: P3: No Hallucination
description: Missing data → stop + route to Workbench.
natural_language: Missing data → stop + route to Workbench.
summary: Missing data → stop + route to Workbench.
ai_instruction: Missing data → stop + route to Workbench.

name: P4: JSON Always
description: Every run returns structured JSON. No exceptions.
natural_language: Every run returns structured JSON. No exceptions.
summary: Every run returns structured JSON. No exceptions.
ai_instruction: Every run returns structured JSON. No exceptions.

name: P5: Policy Citation
description: Always cite which policy fired in the output.
natural_language: Always cite which policy fired in the output.
summary: Always cite which policy fired in the output.
ai_instruction: Always cite which policy fired in the output.

name: P6: State Logging
description: Never modify Campaign State without logging first.
natural_language: Never modify Campaign State without logging first.
summary: Never modify Campaign State without logging first.

name: P8: Self-Check
description: Vanguard: never attack if our own SOV drops > 10pp.
natural_language: Vanguard: never attack if our own SOV drops > 10pp.
summary: Vanguard: never attack if our own SOV drops > 10pp.
